ddls:
CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the swimmer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the swimmer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the swimmer */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event in meters */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the time record */,
  "event_desc" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "swimmer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the swimmer */,
  "swim_time_formatted" REAL /* Formatted swim time */,
  "alt_adj_swim_time_formatted" REAL /* Alternative adjusted swim time formatted */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name for the event */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet where the result was recorded */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., SCY, LCM) */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number where the swimmer competed */,
  "heat_number" INTEGER /* Heat number of the event */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the swimmer in the event */,
  "time_source" TEXT /* Source of the time (e.g., manual, electronic) */,
  "swim_date" TEXT /* Date of the swim event */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the swimmer belongs to */,
  "lsc_id" TEXT /* Local swim committee identifier */,
  "foreign_yesno" TEXT /* Indicates if the result is foreign or domestic */,
  "hytek_power_points" INTEGER /* Hytek power points awarded for the performance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Event identifier */,
  "sanction_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the event is sanctioned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_meet_name FOREIGN KEY ("meet_name") REFERENCES meets ("meet_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100 FR SCY) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Individual, Relay) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event in meters */,
  "stroke_type" TEXT /* Type of stroke used in the event (e.g., Freestyle, Backstroke) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the event is for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the event is for */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., SCY, LCM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet */,
  "meet_date" TEXT /* Date when the meet takes place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meet is held */,
  "sanction_id" INTEGER /* Sanction identifier for the meet */,
  "meet_type" TEXT /* Type of meet (e.g., local, regional, national) */,
  "number_of_events" INTEGER /* Number of events in the meet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimming club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "lsc_id" TEXT /* Local swim committee identifier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Club's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Club's contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the club was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the club was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swimmers" (
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimmer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the swimmer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the swimmer */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the swimmer belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Current age of the swimmer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the swimmer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the swimmer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the swimmer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmers_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sanctions" (
  "sanction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sanction */,
  "sanction_name" TEXT /* Name of the sanction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sanction criteria */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Sanctioning organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sanction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sanction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sanction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_points" (
  "points_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power points entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the power points */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the swimmer */,
  "hytek_power_points" INTEGER /* Power points awarded for the performance */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event for which the points were awarded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the power points were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the power points were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("points_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_points_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_points_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id")
)
